Part.Source:
&Schema = !'dbo' &DatabaseName = !'BASE_ROLIVEIRA' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'Default',!'Remessa', &ServerName, &DatabaseName, &Schema) &AuditSchema = !'auditplus' &AuditDatabaseName = !'BASE_ERPAUDIT' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'AuditPlus',!'AuditRecord', &AuditServerName, &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema)
Do Case Case &operation = !'DRP' Do 'Drop' Case &operation = !'INS' Do 'Insert' Case &operation = !'UPD' Do 'Update' Case &operation = !'DLT' Do 'Delete' EndCase
Sub 'Drop' &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditRemessaInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditRemessaUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditRemessaDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine()
EndSub
Sub 'Insert' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditRemessaInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[Remessa]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER INSERT" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @Context varbinary(128)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextTxt VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextLength tinyint" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemCbrCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNum_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemDta_Inserted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemHor_Inserted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemBanCod_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemTxt_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNomArq_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Inserted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, RemCbrCod, RemNum, RemDta, RemHor, RemBanCod, LEFT(RemTxt, 4000), RemNomArq FROM INSERTED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Inserted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Inserted, @RemCbrCod_Inserted, @RemNum_Inserted, @RemDta_Inserted, @RemHor_Inserted, @RemBanCod_Inserted, @RemTxt_Inserted, @RemNomArq_Inserted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @RecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@RemCbrCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@RemNum_Inserted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'INSERT'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'d65d79c3-a54e-4c13-850e-1f330d827581'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'a163f516-1a9f-4c8d-bf6b-193c135a8767'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordLastId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DELETE FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += !"INSERT INTO #AuditPlusSessionContext VALUES (1, @UserNameVar, @AuditRecordSessionId, @AuditRecordId, 'a163f516-1a9f-4c8d-bf6b-193c135a8767', @RecordKeys, @ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CAST(@AuditRecordId as VarChar(10))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = LEN(@ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONVERT(binary(1), @ContextLength) + CONVERT(varbinary(127), @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET context_info @Context" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'82b36cf7-a282-4cfb-8fd6-47eb2644bc7b'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@EmpCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'301f59ef-fc5c-4f25-83e0-904b12c38bcc'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemCbrCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'d3c86ae4-5dfd-4b26-b992-2da6142d9a01'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemNum_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'f7a1989c-ce0a-42ce-9440-a1fb502506ce'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemDta_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'3c71a544-3d5e-42c5-abb7-bacd3586e3b4'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemHor_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'98db5692-77cb-4d84-bfe5-ddd2ce77a0e1'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemBanCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'f0136966-bd42-4b55-be4c-bac8d56432b9'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemTxt_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'59886d3a-9374-46fc-ad6c-34d88ae8dd84'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemNomArq_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Inserted, @RemCbrCod_Inserted, @RemNum_Inserted, @RemDta_Inserted, @RemHor_Inserted, @RemBanCod_Inserted, @RemTxt_Inserted, @RemNomArq_Inserted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Inserted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() EndSub
Sub 'Update' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditRemessaUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[Remessa]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER UPDATE" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @Context varbinary(128)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextTxt VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextLength tinyint" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemCbrCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNum_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemDta_Deleted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemHor_Deleted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemBanCod_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemTxt_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNomArq_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Deleted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, RemCbrCod, RemNum, RemDta, RemHor, RemBanCod, LEFT(RemTxt, 4000), RemNomArq FROM DELETED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemCbrCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNum_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemDta_Inserted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemHor_Inserted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemBanCod_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemTxt_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNomArq_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Inserted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, RemCbrCod, RemNum, RemDta, RemHor, RemBanCod, LEFT(RemTxt, 4000), RemNomArq FROM INSERTED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Deleted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Inserted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @RemCbrCod_Deleted, @RemNum_Deleted, @RemDta_Deleted, @RemHor_Deleted, @RemBanCod_Deleted, @RemTxt_Deleted, @RemNomArq_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Inserted, @RemCbrCod_Inserted, @RemNum_Inserted, @RemDta_Inserted, @RemHor_Inserted, @RemBanCod_Inserted, @RemTxt_Inserted, @RemNomArq_Inserted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"IF NOT (@EmpCod_Deleted = @EmpCod_Inserted AND @RemCbrCod_Deleted = @RemCbrCod_Inserted AND @RemNum_Deleted = @RemNum_Inserted AND @RemDta_Deleted = @RemDta_Inserted AND @RemHor_Deleted = @RemHor_Inserted AND @RemBanCod_Deleted = @RemBanCod_Inserted AND (( @RemTxt_Deleted IS NULL AND @RemTxt_Inserted IS NULL) OR @RemTxt_Deleted = @RemTxt_Inserted) AND (( @RemNomArq_Deleted IS NULL AND @RemNomArq_Inserted IS NULL) OR @RemNomArq_Deleted = @RemNomArq_Inserted) ) BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @RecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@RemCbrCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@RemNum_Inserted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'UPDATE'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'d65d79c3-a54e-4c13-850e-1f330d827581'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'a163f516-1a9f-4c8d-bf6b-193c135a8767'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordLastId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DELETE FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += !"INSERT INTO #AuditPlusSessionContext VALUES (1, @UserNameVar, @AuditRecordSessionId, @AuditRecordId, 'a163f516-1a9f-4c8d-bf6b-193c135a8767', @RecordKeys, @ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CAST(@AuditRecordId as VarChar(10))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = LEN(@ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONVERT(binary(1), @ContextLength) + CONVERT(varbinary(127), @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET context_info @Context" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'82b36cf7-a282-4cfb-8fd6-47eb2644bc7b'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@EmpCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@EmpCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemNomArq_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @RemCbrCod_Deleted, @RemNum_Deleted, @RemDta_Deleted, @RemHor_Deleted, @RemBanCod_Deleted, @RemTxt_Deleted, @RemNomArq_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Inserted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Deleted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() EndSub
Sub 'Delete' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditRemessaDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[Remessa]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER DELETE" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @Context varbinary(128)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextTxt VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextLength tinyint" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemCbrCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNum_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemDta_Deleted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemHor_Deleted DATETIME" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemBanCod_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemTxt_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RemNomArq_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Deleted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, RemCbrCod, RemNum, RemDta, RemHor, RemBanCod, LEFT(RemTxt, 4000), RemNomArq FROM DELETED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Deleted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @RemCbrCod_Deleted, @RemNum_Deleted, @RemDta_Deleted, @RemHor_Deleted, @RemBanCod_Deleted, @RemTxt_Deleted, @RemNomArq_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @RecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Deleted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@RemCbrCod_Deleted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@RemNum_Deleted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'DELETE'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'d65d79c3-a54e-4c13-850e-1f330d827581'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'a163f516-1a9f-4c8d-bf6b-193c135a8767'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordLastId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DELETE FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += !"INSERT INTO #AuditPlusSessionContext VALUES (1, @UserNameVar, @AuditRecordSessionId, @AuditRecordId, 'a163f516-1a9f-4c8d-bf6b-193c135a8767', @RecordKeys, @ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CAST(@AuditRecordId as VarChar(10))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = LEN(@ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONVERT(binary(1), @ContextLength) + CONVERT(varbinary(127), @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET context_info @Context" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'82b36cf7-a282-4cfb-8fd6-47eb2644bc7b'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@EmpCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'301f59ef-fc5c-4f25-83e0-904b12c38bcc'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemCbrCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'d3c86ae4-5dfd-4b26-b992-2da6142d9a01'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RemNum_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @RemCbrCod_Deleted, @RemNum_Deleted, @RemDta_Deleted, @RemHor_Deleted, @RemBanCod_Deleted, @RemTxt_Deleted, @RemNomArq_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Deleted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() EndSub
